code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut last = ""
mut found = false
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      if not string.is_empty(string.trim(current))
        last = current
        found = true
      end
      current = ""
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(string.trim(current))
  last = current
  found = true
end

if found
  println(last)
else
  println("(none)")
end
